name: Hook Problem Solution
best_for: creator advice that needs immediate clarity

beat_sequence.beat_job: Name the situation so the viewer recognizes themselves immediately.
Make the friction specific enough that the solution feels necessary.
Show the simple action that resolves the pressure.
Land the felt result so the viewer remembers why it matters.

retention_or_clarity_job: Keeps the viewer watching by making the gap between discomfort and relief obvious.
avoid_when: The idea is mostly atmospheric rather than problem-driven.
The solution needs too much explanation for a short post.
